summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Hub authentication and API key management. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly - login, dashboard navigation, API key CRUD, protected routes, logout.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - successful login returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login - invalid credentials return 401
POST /api/auth/login - wrong password returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - without token returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - with valid token returns user email
POST /api/auth/logout - clears session
GET /api/apps - without auth returns 401
GET /api/apps - with auth returns apps list with chatwoot
POST /api/apps/chatwoot/keys - creates new API key
GET /api/apps/chatwoot/keys - lists keys with masked values
DELETE /api/apps/chatwoot/keys/{key_id} - revokes API key
DELETE /api/apps/chatwoot/keys/nonexistent - returns 404
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - without auth returns 401
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - with JWT returns tools
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - with X-API-Key header returns tools
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - with Bearer API key returns tools
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - with invalid API key returns 401
GET /api/chatwoot/config - with JWT returns config
GET /api/chatwoot/mcp/info - with API key returns MCP info
POST /api/chatwoot/webhooks/receive - accepts events without auth
GET /api/chatwoot/webhooks/events/history - requires auth
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password form
Frontend: Successful login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard hub shows Chatwoot app card with tools count and active keys
Frontend: Clicking Chatwoot card navigates to /dashboard/chatwoot
Frontend: Chatwoot dashboard shows tools, config, connection status
Frontend: API Keys tab shows key manager with create/revoke functionality
Frontend: New key creation shows full key value once
Frontend: Key list shows masked key previews
Frontend: Back button navigates from chatwoot to dashboard hub
Frontend: Logout clears session and redirects to login
Frontend: /dashboard without auth redirects to /login
Frontend: /dashboard/chatwoot without auth redirects to /login
Frontend: Invalid login shows error message
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ChatwootDashboard.js has React Hook dependency warnings (fetchOutputFormat, testConnection) - not blocking but should be fixed for clean builds
seed_data_creation: Test API keys created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully implemented and tested. Routes restructured: /api/auth/* for auth, /api/apps/* for app management, /api/chatwoot/* for chatwoot-specific endpoints. JWT auth via cookie or Bearer header. API keys work via X-API-Key header or Bearer header. Webhook receive endpoint has no auth (external receiver).
